Location

New York, NY (HQ); Miami, FL; Remote (Canada); Remote (US); San Francisco, CA

Department

Compensation

  • NY/SFThe listed range reflects total OTE with a 60/40 base-to-commission split. $136K – $187K • Offers Equity • Offers Commission
  • NationwideThe listed range reflects total OTE with a 60/40 base-to-commission split. $122.4K – $168K • Offers Equity • Offers Commission

The final compensation will depend on the location and level at which the candidate is hired.
